chunks.text: Technical Reports - Nilah Ioannidis. Pedigree-Aware Genotype Simulation by Margarita Geleta. STraP: Self-Training for Proteins (EECS-2023-110) by Arbaaz Muslim and Nilah Ioannidis. Performance and comparison of current sequence-based models on individual gene expression prediction (EECS-2023-83) by Connie Huang. Evaluating the use of sequence-to-expression predictors for personalized expression prediction (EECS-2022-120) by Parth Baokar.
